name: First Sunday Concert Series: Lauren Hooker
shortDescription: First Sunday Concert Series presents jazz vocalist and pianist Lauren Hooker at Hadden House on April 5 at 3:00 PM.
fullDescription:
Desert Rose Bahá’í Institute’s First Sunday Concert Series presents jazz vocalist and pianist Lauren Hooker on Sunday, April 5, 2026, at 3:00 PM in Hadden House, 1950 West William Sears Drive, Eloy, AZ 85131. All are warmly invited to attend.

Lauren Hooker is a vocalist, pianist, recording artist, and educator whose work spans performance, composition, and arts‑in‑education programs. She has developed and presented Musical Legends Arts in Education programs and brings a rich background in jazz performance and teaching to her appearances. Her concerts blend expressive vocals, inventive piano, and original compositions rooted in the jazz tradition.

If you are in the area, we invite you to join us for this First Sunday Concert at Desert Rose Bahá’í Institute and enjoy an afternoon of live jazz in the welcoming setting of Hadden House.

This performance is part of DRBI’s ongoing First Sunday Concert Series.
title: First Sunday Concert Series: Lauren Hooker
